senses.gloss: verbal noun of أَبْهَمَ (ʔabhama, “to make obscure”) (form IV)

etymology.text:
Verbal noun of أَبْهَمَ (ʔabhama, “to make obscure”) from ب ه م (b h m).

With labial assimilation – not found in بَنَان (banān, “fingers”) – related to Akkadian 𒋗𒅆 (ubānum, “finger”), Eblaite 𒁀𒂍𒈝 (ba-ʾà-núm /⁠bahānum⁠/), Hebrew בֹּהֶן (bṓhen, “thumb”), Mehri hābḗn (“thumb”), Harsusi ḥābēn.
